audit_items.proof_trace: flag_enabled_disabled() is a 3-line function that returns one of two string literals ("enabled" / "disabled") via a ternary expression; it contains zero dynamic allocations (no malloc/calloc/realloc/strdup). The universal quantification in the property assertion has an empty domain, so the property is vacuously satisfied. All call sites pass the result directly to printf as a %s argument, requiring no ownership transfer or deallocation.
